qa_pairs.question: What is the primary function of the Cellranger aggr pipeline?
qa_pairs.answer: The Cellranger aggr pipeline aggregates outputs from multiple runs of cellranger count, normalizing those runs to the same sequencing depth and then recomputing the feature-barcode matrices and analysis on the combined data.

qa_pairs.question: How can the Cellranger aggr pipeline be used to combine data from multiple samples?
qa_pairs.answer: The Cellranger aggr pipeline can be used to combine data from multiple samples into an experiment-wide feature-barcode matrix and analysis, after normalizing outputs from multiple cellranger count runs to the same sequencing depth and recomputing the analysis.
